description_long: This is a weathered wooden picket fence section, featuring eleven vertical slats evenly spaced and attached to two horizontal rails. The pickets have pointed tops, giving the fence a classic, traditional appearance often seen in suburban or park settings. The wood shows signs of aging and discoloration, with visible dark patches and stains that suggest prolonged outdoor exposure. The horizontal rails are set behind the pickets, providing structural support and stability. The overall construction is simple, with no visible decorative embellishments beyond the pointed tops. The fence is relatively lightweight and appears to be a standalone segment, not anchored into the ground.
description: A weathered wooden picket fence section with pointed tops and visible aging, featuring two horizontal rails and eleven vertical slats.
description_view_0: Front view showing all eleven pointed pickets and the two horizontal rails with visible weathering.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the alignment of the pickets and rails.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the same picket and rail arrangement with weathered wood texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness and layered construction of the fence.
